delivery.title: Delivery & payment
delivery.subtitle: Fast, reliable delivery across Tashkent and all of Uzbekistan
delivery.tashkentFree: Free on orders over 300,000 UZS. Otherwise — 20,000 UZS.
delivery.regionsFree: Free on orders over 700,000 UZS. Otherwise — 30,000 UZS.
delivery.note: After your order is confirmed, an operator will contact you to agree the exact time and address.

loyalty.title: Loyalty programme
loyalty.subtitle: Privileges for regular customers and partners
loyalty.privilegedDesc: Up to 15% cashback on purchases, weekly promotions and access to private sales.
loyalty.privilegedClub: “Loyalty Club”: with steady purchases of 50+ points a month, after 6 months you receive premium brand sets as a gift.
loyalty.consultantDesc: A status for professional partners growing their own referral network.
loyalty.consultantLegal: Bonuses are paid only after registering as a sole proprietor (YTT) and signing an advertising-services contract — guaranteeing full legality of the business.
loyalty.pointsDesc: Wholesale turnover converts into points. The value of a point depends on the product category:

payment.subtitle: Pay whichever way is convenient for you.

methods.title: Click
methods.text: Online payment via the Click app or USSD.

faq.question: Is payment secure?
faq.answer: Yes, all online payments go through the encrypted Click and Payme gateways.

faq.question: Can I pay on delivery?
faq.answer: Of course — cash or card to the courier.

guarantee.title: Guarantee & returns
guarantee.subtitle: We fully guarantee the quality and clean composition of our products.

points.title: Quality control
points.text: Every batch is tested for metals and pathogens.

faq.question: How do I return a product?
faq.answer: Call our operator — returns are accepted within 30 days (unopened packaging).

faq.question: Will I be refunded?
faq.answer: Yes, you receive a full refund for returned products.

deliveryFaq.question: How long does delivery take?
deliveryFaq.answer: 1–2 business days across Tashkent, 2–5 business days to the regions via EMU.

deliveryFaq.question: Is delivery free?
deliveryFaq.answer: Free on orders over 300,000 UZS in Tashkent and 700,000 UZS to the regions.
